Redaguojant ar pridedant antra — * navigacija lieka, kitaip zmogus jaustusi ismestas is paskyros. */ private static function is_onboarding() { if ( ! is_user_logged_in() ) { return false; } if ( ! isset( $_GET['action'] ) || sanitize_key( wp_unslash( $_GET['action'] ) ) !== 'create' ) { return false; } global $wpdb; $count = (int) $wpdb->get_var( $wpdb->prepare( "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `{$wpdb->prefix}ps_pets` WHERE user_id = %d AND status = 'active'", get_current_user_id() ) ); return $count === 0; } public static function body_class( $classes ) { if ( false !== get_query_var( self::ENDPOINT, false ) && self::is_onboarding() ) { $classes[] = 'ps-pet-onboarding'; } return $classes; } public static function render_account_page() { // S204: profilio ekranas + atskiras formos host (be dubliuoto #pspet-form ID). // ?action=create — serverio kelias: forma atidaroma IS KARTO, veikia ir be JS mygtuko. $create = isset( $_GET['action'] ) && sanitize_key( wp_unslash( $_GET['action'] ) ) === 'create'; $create_url = esc_url( add_query_arg( 'action', 'create', wc_get_account_endpoint_url( self::ENDPOINT ) ) ); // S211: onboarding rezime navigacija paslepta -> duodam kelia atgal. if ( self::is_onboarding() ) { echo '← Grįžti į paskyrą'; } echo '
'; echo '
'; if ( $create ) { echo ''; } } // --- Shortcode --- public static function shortcode_form( $atts ) { self::enqueue_assets( true ); // force enqueue return '
'; } // --- Assets --- public static function enqueue_assets( $force = false ) { $base = plugins_url( 'assets/', dirname( __FILE__ ) ); // S211: paskyros navigacijos stilius — VISUOSE MyAccount puslapiuose, // ne tik augintinio. Kitaip paskyroje butu dvi dizaino sistemos: // "Mano augintinis" modernus, o "Uzsakymai" — desimt metu atgal. if ( function_exists( 'is_account_page' ) && is_account_page() ) { wp_enqueue_style( 'pspet-account', $base . 'account.css', array(), self::VERSION ); } // Iterpiam tik jei puslapyje yra shortcode arba MyAccount augintinis tab if ( ! $force && ! self::should_load() ) { return; } wp_enqueue_style( 'pspet-form', $base . 'pet-form.css', array(), self::VERSION ); // Inter is Google Fonts wp_enqueue_style( 'pspet-inter', 'https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;500;600&display=swap', array(), null ); wp_enqueue_script( 'pspet-form', $base . 'pet-form.js', array(), self::VERSION, true ); // Profilio ekranas — MyAccount puslapyje (JS pats tikrina ar yra #pspet-profile). // S204: papildomas saugiklis — endpoint query var (jei is_account_page() del temos/konteksto nesuveiktu). if ( ( function_exists( 'is_account_page' ) && is_account_page() ) || false !== get_query_var( self::ENDPOINT, false ) ) { wp_enqueue_script( 'pspet-profile', $base . 'pet-profile.js', array(), self::VERSION, true ); } $config = array( 'restUrl' => esc_url_raw( get_rest_url( null, 'petshop/v1' ) ), 'nonce' => wp_create_nonce( 'wp_rest' ), 'isLoggedIn' => is_user_logged_in(), 'homeUrl' => home_url( '/' ), 'petPageUrl' => wc_get_account_endpoint_url( self::ENDPOINT ), 'imagesUrl' => plugins_url( 'assets/images/', dirname( __FILE__ ) ), ); wp_localize_script( 'pspet-form', 'PSPetConfig', $config ); } private static function should_load() { global $post; // Bet kuris MyAccount puslapis (page id 14) — kad augintinis tab veiktu if ( function_exists( 'is_account_page' ) && is_account_page() ) { return true; } // Puslapis su shortcode if ( $post && has_shortcode( $post->post_content, 'petshop_pet_form' ) ) { return true; } return false; } /** * Aktyvuojant plugin — flush rewrite (kad endpoint veiktu). */ public static function flush_rewrite() { self::add_endpoint(); flush_rewrite_rules(); } }
